name: io.github.AliKarami/mikromcp
title: MikroMCP
description: MCP server for MikroTik RouterOS: typed tools, dry-run, RBAC, audit logs, and rollback.

environmentVariables.name: MIKROMCP_CONFIG_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the MikroMCP router registry YAML file. Defaults to ~/.mikromcp/routers.yaml.

environmentVariables.name: MIKROMCP_STDIO_IDENTITY
environmentVariables.description: Optional identity name for stdio transport RBAC. Omit to use the built-in superadmin identity.

environmentVariables.name: MIKROMCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Optional log level: trace, debug, info, warn, or error. Defaults to info.
